The Work

Four books.
One mission.

I am on a mission to help 1,000 Indian manufacturing companies reach ₹100 Crore.

These four books are how I get there — one manufacturer at a time. Each book tackles a different reason why good businesses stay stuck, and gives you the tools to break through.

How We Work Together

Most manufacturers don't have a strategy problem.
They have a clarity problem.

01 — Diagnostic
You want to figure out exactly where to compete and how to win — without guessing.
We work through your business together — your market, your customers, your constraints — until you have a strategy that is yours and nobody else's.
Book a Call →
02 — Advisory
You want a strategic advisor in the room every time you make a critical decision.
I work alongside you as a thinking partner — present for the hard calls, the pivots, the moments where the wrong decision costs you a year.
Book a Call →
03 — Call
You're not sure yet.
Let's talk first.
No pitch. No pressure. In 30 minutes we will look at where your business is, what is keeping it there, and whether what I do is the right fit. You will leave with clarity on the real problem — whether we work together or not.
Book a Call →
